name: monthly-refactor-scan
description: Monthly scan for code that would benefit from refactoring
prompt: OpenCode, identifie 3 zones du code qui beneficieraient d'un refactor (code smells, duplication, complexite cyclomatique elevee, dette technique visible). Pour chaque zone : (1) chemin du fichier, (2) probleme identifie, (3) suggestion de refactor. Format markdown. Ne refactor PAS, juste recommande.
